settings.redirectUrisHelp: Staff sign-in uses the OAuth client saved below. Add the listed Gmail and Calendar callback URLs in Google Cloud.

bindings.warningArchived: {{profile}} is archived. Choose an active Microsoft app.
bindings.warningMissingCapability: {{profile}} is selected, but it cannot handle {{consumer}} yet. Edit the app and turn on {{consumer}}, or choose another app.
bindings.warningNoApps: Create a Microsoft app, turn on {{consumer}}, then choose it here.
bindings.warningNoCapable: No app can handle {{consumer}} yet. Edit a Microsoft app and turn on {{consumer}}, then choose it here.

dialog.capabilitiesHelp: Only enabled capabilities can bind to this Microsoft app.

providersWorkbench.descriptionEe: Set up the provider path your tenant uses. Configure both only when email, calendar, SSO, or Teams workflows require both ecosystems.
